title: Constant Prop to Avoid False Index Out of Bounds

features.name: single-element unpacked array indexed by constant wire
features.description: Code should include a single-element unpacked array (memory[0:0]) indexed by a constant-initialized wire

features.name: single-element unpacked array indexed by variable wire
features.description: Code should include a single-element unpacked array (memory[0:0]) indexed by a module input variable
